series_description: Communication from or regarding inmates in correctional facilities (including any attachments or supplemental documents).
retention_statement: Paper: Returned to the inmate or destroyed upon receipt. ; Electronic: Destroyed upon receipt.

series_description: Inquiries made to Department of Youth Services or Department of Rehabilitation and Correction.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain six months ; Paper: Retain six months

series_description: Material collected for the production of CIIC publications (included but not limited to inspection reports, systemic issue reports, quarterly/annual/biennial reports, and data briefs).
retention_statement: Electronic: Destroy upon publication. ; Paper: Destroy upon publication.

series_description: Records (including, but not limited to, use of force investigation packets, incident reports, and grievance procedure documents) received from another agency (including, but not limited to, the Department of Rehabilitation and Correction and the Department of Youth Services) that are used by CIIC staff in the process of responding to an inmate letter or developing a report.
retention_statement: Paper: May be destroyed upon receipt. ; Electronic: May be destroyed upon receipt.

series_description: Documents pertaining to public records requests, including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor or other staff, redacted and unredacted responsive records. Maintained to document compliance with public records law obligations (
